title: stylidium dichotomum
intro: Stylidium dichotomum, also known as the forked trigger plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stylidiaceae. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, with the roots containing a compound called stylofoline, which has been found to have antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stylidium dichotomum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared as a tea or decoction for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and applications.
